(Petugas Loket)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="50" x="910" y="1030" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cG5iEp8DrIiLVLoKiqdr-41" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontStyle=1;" value="Pasien /
Pengunjung" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="50" x="910" y="1330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cG5iEp8DrIiLVLoKiqdr-42" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Melakukan Login" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="440" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cG5iEp8DrIiLVLoKiqdr-43" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Mengelola Daftar Antrian" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="440" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cG5iEp8DrIiLVLoKiqdr-44" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Mengelola Pengaturan
